overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player traverses covered walkways, crosses streets with futuristic vehicles, passes a cinema building, and observes a fireworks display near the ENORCHI tower before walking along a street with distinctive pink illuminated benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping walkway with neon storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered walkway observing neon shop signs and graffiti walls

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the pedestrian path
bright red and green neon signs advertising shops
wall covered in white graffiti tags and street art
storefront with illuminated vending machines and displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway at night, illuminated by vibrant neon storefront signs on the right. The camera moves forward past a graffiti-covered concrete wall, approaching a street intersection visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and futuristic traffic

events.description: exits covered walkway and steps onto open street crosswalk
futuristic black sedan drives past the crosswalk from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing
large building with colorful illuminated facade and decorative patterns
staircase leading up to building entrance on the left side
large green neon arrow pointing left mounted on building

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway onto a wide street intersection, crossing yellow zebra stripes while a futuristic black sedan passes by. The art deco cinema building becomes visible on the right, featuring a colorful illuminated facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with cinema building transitioning to narrow alley

events.description: turns right into darker covered alleyway with poster-covered walls

agents.ego_description: walking past the cinema building and entering a narrow dark alley

entered.detail: dark concrete wall of narrow passage
wall covered with colorful promotional posters and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the street past the cinema building, then turns right into a narrow dark alleyway. The walls are covered with advertising posters, and the lighting becomes significantly darker as the camera proceeds toward the alley exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alley with vending machines and poster walls

events.description: emerging from dark alley into brightly lit open plaza with fireworks visible

agents.ego_description: walking through dark corridor toward the illuminated exit where fireworks are visible

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking toward camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: tall building with large ENORCHI signage visible at the end of the alley
pink and white fireworks exploding in the night sky above the buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through the dark narrow alley, passing vending machines and poster-covered walls. As the camera approaches the exit, the ENORCHI tower building becomes visible in the distance with fireworks exploding in the sky above it, marking a dramatic lighting transition.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with ENORCHI tower and fireworks display

events.description: fireworks display visible in sky above ENORCHI building creating festive atmosphere
crossing street with futuristic vehicles passing by in the background

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza observing fireworks and navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing at crosswalk waiting to cross

entered.detail: large glowing holographic displays floating above the street
illuminated traffic control signals above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide open plaza dominated by the ENORCHI tower with spectacular fireworks exploding overhead. The scene is bustling with pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. The camera crosses the street near the tower, passing holographic advertisements before the ENORCHI building recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with distinctive pink neon underglow benches

agents.ego_description: walking along the street observing the unique pink illuminated benches and storefronts

entered.detail: futuristic benches with bright pink neon underglow lighting
exterior staircase leading up to building entrance with red lighting
overhead structure covering the pedestrian path ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking along a distinctive street lined with benches featuring bright pink neon underglow. The area is partially covered by an overhead structure, with various storefronts and traffic visible. The camera continues forward toward another covered section of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit metropolis, moving from enclosed pedestrian walkways into a grand plaza before settling into a glowing urban street. It begins within a covered walkway illuminated by vibrant storefronts and graffiti, moving forward until the camera exits onto a wide intersection where a futuristic black sedan passes by an art deco cinema. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right into a dark, narrow alleyway lined with advertising posters and vending machines, creating a stark contrast in lighting before the path opens up again. As the camera emerges from the alley, the environment expands into a bustling plaza dominated by the ENORCHI tower and spectacular fireworks exploding overhead amidst holographic advertisements. Finally, the camera moves away from the tower to walk along a street characterized by benches with bright pink neon underglow, proceeding toward another covered section of the city.
